extensionDescription.message: Clip, save, and organize web content instantly. Local storage, Markdown export, full-text search. Privacy-focused.

popup_clipCount.description: Label for number of clips in popup header

popup_visualSelectTool.description: Button label for visual selector tool

popup_optionsButton.description: Button label to open options page

popup_sidePanelButton.description: Button label to open side panel

popup_howToClipStep1.description: First step in how to clip guide

popup_howToClipStep2.description: Second step in how to clip guide

popup_howToClipStep3.description: Third step in how to clip guide

common_noClipsFound.description: Message when search returns no results

common_backToList.description: Back button label in detail view

search_searchDescription.message: Type to search through your clipped content
search_searchDescription.description: Search input description for screen readers

clips_deleteConfirm.description: Confirmation dialog for deleting a clip. $1 will be replaced with clip title.

clips_regenerateTitle.description: Button label to regenerate AI title

clips_regenerating.description: Loading message while regenerating AI title

clips_newClipAdded.description: Toast message when new clip is added

export_noClipsToExport.description: Message when trying to export with no clips

export_exportSuccess.description: Success message after export. $1 is number of clips, $2 is export format.

export_exportToClipboard.description: Button label to copy to clipboard. $1 is the format.

export_exportToFile.description: Button label to export to file. $1 is the format.

export_copySuccess.description: Success message after copying to clipboard

export_copyFailed.description: Error message when copy to clipboard fails

export_exportJson.description: Button label to export as JSON

export_copyJson.description: Button label to copy JSON to clipboard

export_exportMarkdown.description: Button label to export as Markdown

export_copyMarkdown.description: Button label to copy Markdown to clipboard

import_importSuccess.description: Success message after import. $1 is number of imported clips.

import_importSuccessMessage.description: System notification message after successful import

import_clipboardImportFailed.description: Error message when clipboard import fails

import_importFromFile.description: Button label to import from file. $1 is the format.

import_importFromClipboard.description: Button label to import from clipboard. $1 is the format.

sidepanel_noClipsHint.message: Select some text on a webpage and use the keyboard shortcut or context menu to clip it.

sidepanel_transferHint.message: File and clipboard actions use the currently selected format.
sidepanel_transferHint.description: Hint text about import/export format selection

sidepanel_storageQuotaWarning.message: ⚠️ Storage almost full. Consider exporting or deleting old clips.
sidepanel_storageQuotaWarning.description: Warning message when storage is almost full

background_storageQuotaWarningTitle.description: Notification title for storage quota warning

background_storageQuotaWarningMessage.message: You're using $1% of available storage. Consider exporting or deleting old clips.
background_storageQuotaWarningMessage.description: Notification message for storage quota warning. $1 is the percentage used.

background_clipFailedMessage.message: Could not communicate with the page. Try refreshing.

background_extensionInstalled.description: Notification title when extension is installed

background_extensionInstalledMessage.message: Select text and press Ctrl+Shift+Y (or Cmd+Shift+Y on Mac) to clip content.
background_extensionInstalledMessage.description: Notification message when extension is installed

detail_clipped.description: Label indicating when content was clipped

detail_ariaLabelRegenerate.description: Aria label for regenerate title button

detail_ariaLabelAiGenerated.description: Aria label for AI generated indicator

aria_switchLayout.description: Aria label for density toggle. $1 is 'compact' or 'standard'.

aria_importFormat.description: Aria label for import format select

aria_exportFormat.description: Aria label for export format select

time_minutesAgo.description: Relative time for minutes ago. $1 is number of minutes.

time_hoursAgo.description: Relative time for hours ago. $1 is number of hours.

time_daysAgo.description: Relative time for days ago. $1 is number of days.

content_noContentSelected.description: Error message when no content is selected

content_pleaseSelectText.message: Please select some text or content before clipping.
content_pleaseSelectText.description: Hint message when user tries to clip without selection

content_processingLargeContent.description: Status message when processing large content

content_largeContentWarning.message: The selected content is very large ($1KB). This may take a moment. Continue?
content_largeContentWarning.description: Warning message for large content. $1 is the size in KB.

content_queued.description: Status message when clip is queued

content_queuedMessage.message: Your clip is queued ($1 in queue). It will be processed automatically.
content_queuedMessage.description: Message when clip is queued. $1 is the queue position.

content_visualSelectorHint.message: Visual Select: hover content, click to preview, Esc to cancel
content_visualSelectorHint.description: Hint text for visual selector mode

content_visualSelectorCanceled.description: Notification title when visual selector is canceled

content_selectorModeClosed.description: Notification message when selector mode is closed

content_confirmCapture.description: Title for visual selector confirmation dialog

content_noVisibleText.description: Placeholder text when no visible text is found

content_noTextToCapture.description: Error message when area has no text

content_noTextInArea.message: The selected area has no visible text. Choose another area.
content_noTextInArea.description: Hint when selected area has no text

content_visualSelectionSaved.message: Visual selection saved to Block Clipper

content_noAreaSelected.description: Error message when no area is selected in visual mode

content_moveToSelect.message: Move your mouse over page content and click again.
content_moveToSelect.description: Hint when visual selector has no area selected

content_tooManyRequests.message: Too many requests queued. Wait for current clips to finish.
content_tooManyRequests.description: Error message when too many clips are queued

content_visualSelectionFailed.description: Error message when visual selection fails

options_batchDeleteConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to delete $1 selected clip(s)? This action cannot be undone.
options_batchDeleteConfirm.description: Batch delete confirmation dialog. $1 is the count.

options_batchDeleteSuccess.description: Batch delete success message. $1 is the count.

popup_savePage.description: Button label to save current page

popup_savePageSaving.description: Loading state for save page button

background_savePageSuccess.description: Notification title when page is saved

background_savePageSuccessMessage.message: Full page content saved to Block Clipper
background_savePageSuccessMessage.description: Notification message when page is saved

background_savePageFailed.description: Notification title when page save fails

background_noActivePage.message: No active page found. Navigate to a webpage first.
background_noActivePage.description: Error message when no active tab

background_storageQuotaExceeded.message: Storage almost full. Delete some clips or export data.
background_storageQuotaExceeded.description: Error message when storage quota exceeded
